_meta.description: Per-holder shareholding pattern (share counts) for listed SAHIs, from the quarterly exchange shareholding-pattern filing. Feeds the Captable tab's shareholding_shares::<holder> cells via build_value_store.py (rank-1 official filing). Missing stays missing — never 0; a holder is written only with a real sourced count.
_meta.source_policy: Official exchange shareholding-pattern filing is authoritative (rank 1). The named per-holder breakdown is NOT on Screener's public page (login-only there), so the filing is the source; Screener's four category totals are kept below as a public cross-check only.

category_totals_pct.source_name: Screener.in public company page — shareholding pattern (category aggregates, Mar 2026)
category_totals_pct.note: Public Screener exposes only these four class totals + shareholder count; the named-holder list is login-only.

provenance.source_name: Niva Bupa Health Insurance — Shareholding pattern, quarter ended 31 Mar 2026 (Q4 FY26), as filed with BSE/NSE (Reg. 31 LODR). Seeded from the owner's master Captable and internally verified: the 15 holders sum exactly to the 1,84,74,56,771 total shares and each holder's implied % matches the disclosed %. Re-derived automatically each quarter by the shareholding-fetch pipeline (cross-reference: https://www.screener.in/company/NIVABUPA/#shareholding).
